chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Marriage

text: 4345 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "اِتَّخَذُوا اَلْأَهْلَ فَإِنَّهُ أَرْزَقُ لَكُمْ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4345 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Take a spouse, for it is a means of increasing your sustenance."
